title: stelis protracta
intro: Stelis protracta is a species of orchid found in tropical regions, characterized by its unique and delicate appearance. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Stelis protracta include relief from coughs, colds, and bronchitis, as well as its potential to aid in reducing fever and alleviating congestion. Stelis protracta is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, with some cultures also using it in traditional medicine to create tonics and syrups for respiratory health.
